title: rm/rmi: Don't exit until we've tried them all
body: If we're told to remove more than one container or image, actually try to remove them all, but still return an error if we fail at any of them.

comments.body: I think the other patch set just merged both?
This one duplicates the man page part, as I was going to move that hunk from the larger man page PR to here, but since we're about to merge that I can undo that.
LGTM.  Obviously we're only returning the last error if there are multiples, but I think that's ok.  Regardless, this is much better than the previous functionality.
